subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Though in thine earthly days thou didst suffer toil and hardship, and forsook hearth and home, bereft and homeless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ثابت پیمانا هر چند در ایام خویش زحمت و مشقت کشیدی خانمان گذاشتی بی سر و سامان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @poems and quotation from poetry, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
